instructions.value:
Fan out to 10 parallel workers. Return an array with 10 Worker tasks.

Return:
```json
[
  {"kind": "Worker", "value": {"id": 1}},
  {"kind": "Worker", "value": {"id": 2}},
  ...
  {"kind": "Worker", "value": {"id": 10}}
]
```

Process your assigned work item.

Input: `{"id": <number>}`

Return `[]` when done.
